name: finance_notify
display_name: 财务通知 Slack 频道
description: 向 bytedance.slack.com 的 #finance-daily 频道推送消息。身份是财务 BP 团队的 finance-notify-bot。

actions.name: post_message
actions.description: Post a message to a Slack channel

actions.name: upload_file
actions.description: Upload a file with an optional comment

_demo_note: UniSpace demo does not actually send Slack messages. Any action this connector receives will be logged and echoed back instead of posted. In production this would POST to the Slack Web API using the bot token.
